use_cases: Displaying individual investor's stock portfolio holdings and performance metrics
Financial dashboard widget showing portfolio overview with gains and losses
Tracking investment positions with real-time price changes and news
Mobile-responsive portfolio summary for on-the-go investors
Integrating portfolio data with related financial news feed
ai_summary: A stock portfolio card component that displays individual investor holdings with ticker symbols, share counts, current prices, and gain/loss indicators. Features a clean minimalist design with financial news integration, color-coded performance indicators (green for gains, red for losses), and uses Framer Motion for subtle animations. Suitable for fintech dashboards, investment tracking applications, and personal finance mobile apps.
